/CAL: BENCH WARRANT RETURN/BWDNC/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG//FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/NTW60/LDPX:01-18-22/ACM/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ONPRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH AGPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTHON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSO/CTORD: SFSO COMMUNITY PROGRAMS WILL PLACE ANELECTRONIC MONITORING DEVICE ON THE DEFENDANT PRIOR TO RELEASE FROM CUSTODY AND WILL PROVIDE ALL INSTRUCTIONS AT THAT TIME,/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/CONTD: PREHEARING CONFERENCE/DOP/
